data.body:
## Gap Analysis Amendment

AC amendment from gap analysis: The .test-index marker removal acceptance criterion only verified one of three markers. All three markers must be verified removed after implementation.

Additional Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] .test-index [marker] annotation removed for examples/ci.example.yml entry
  Verify: ! grep '\[test_ci_example_yml_no_tickets_paths\]' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] .test-index [marker] annotation removed for examples/pre-commit-config.example.yaml entry
  Verify: ! grep '\[test_precommit_example_no_tickets_exclude\]' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
